differential_diagnoses: Hemobilia secondary to pseudoaneurysm or biliovascular fistula
Portal vein thrombosis with secondary portal hypertension
next_steps: Interventional radiology consultation for diagnostic visceral angiography
Measurement of serum CA 19-9 and CEA levels
Eovist-enhanced MRI of the liver for characterization of the perihilar lesion
Upper endoscopy focused on the hepaticojejunostomy site to look for sentinel clot or active biliary bleeding
Proton pump inhibitor therapy for management of erosive gastropathy
Consideration of liver biopsy of the perihilar mass
